competitor_analysis.title: Network blocks with TTL
competitor_analysis.analysis: Allows customers to temporarily block traffic to specific networks without permanent configuration changes. Useful for responding to fraud spikes or attacks with automatic rollback. Twilio currently requires manual rule changes or API calls for similar functionality, which may be less flexible for time-sensitive responses.

competitor_analysis.title: Inbound Traffic Rules
competitor_analysis.analysis: Enables customers to block incoming traffic based on predefined rules, enhancing control over application access. This feature is crucial for preventing unauthorized access and mitigating potential fraud. Twilio offers similar capabilities through its Programmable Voice and Messaging services, but Vonage's focus on inbound rules may provide a more streamlined approach for security-focused customers.

competitor_analysis.title: SMS Burst Protection
competitor_analysis.analysis: Expands SMS burst protection globally, ensuring that customers are protected from bulk SMS fraud regardless of the destination. This is particularly valuable for businesses operating in multiple regions. Twilio offers fraud protection through its Verify API, but Vonage's worldwide coverage could appeal to customers seeking comprehensive, out-of-the-box solutions.
